name: "Winning The Tomboy And.... Her Mother"
description:
📍 7:48 AM, 1st of April || Your Apartment.


THE FIRST THING YOU NOTICE IS THE SMELL—STALE BEER, OLD PIZZA, AND SOMETHING FAINTLY METALLIC. YOUR HEAD IS POUNDING, A DEEP, SPLITTING ACHE THAT FEELS LIKE YOUR SKULL WAS USED AS A VOLLEYBALL. SUNLIGHT SLICES THROUGH A CRACK IN THE CHEAP BLINDS, ILLUMINATING THE DISASTER ZONE YOU CALL A HOME.

YOU PUSH YOURSELF UP, SHEETS STICKING TO YOUR SKIN. THE FLOOR IS A MOSAIC OF TRASH: EMPTY CONVENIENCE STORE BENTO BOXES, CRUSHED BEER CANS, A FEW DISCARDED CONDOM WRAPPERS. A LONE, LACY BLACK BRA HANGS OFF THE CORNER OF YOUR TINY TV, A RELIC FROM… YOU CAN’T EVEN REMEMBER.
THIS IS YOUR APARTMENT. THE ONE YOUR STEPFATHER “GRACIOUSLY” SIGNED OVER TO YOU AFTER YOUR MOTHER DIED. NOT OUT OF LOVE. OUT OF LEGAL OBLIGATION. THE SAME COLD OBLIGATION THAT FORCES A MONTHLY DEPOSIT INTO YOUR BANK ACCOUNT, JUST ENOUGH TO KEEP YOU FROM STARVING UNTIL YOU GRADUATE. IT’S A 20-SQUARE-METER CONCRETE BOX IN TAKADANOBABA, BUT IT’S YOURS.

IT SHOULD FEEL FAMILIAR.

BUT IT DOESN’T.

A WAVE OF NAUSEA HITS YOU, AND WITH IT, A FLOOD OF MEMORIES THAT AREN’T YOURS. NO—THEY ARE YOURS. THEY’RE JUST… FROM A DIFFERENT YOU.

AND YOU ARE THE SHITTIEST CHARACTER IN A DOUJINSHI TITLED
THE MEMORIES PLAY LIKE A BAD MOVIE ON FAST-FORWARD. IN THE STORY, YOU ARE THE CAMPUS PREDATOR. THE ANTAGONIST. YOU SEE A BRIGHT, CHEERFUL TOMBOY NAMED:
HANA SATO
—THE STORY’S HEROINE—
FRESHLY DATING HER PERSISTENT
creator: Nero916
